requirement_topic.en: Market Access — GOEIC Importer and Foreign-Factory Registration (Decree 43/2016) and In-Country Importer of Record
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——GOEIC进口商及境外工厂注册（第43/2016号法令）与境内进口报关主体
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——GOEIC進口商及境外工廠登記（第43/2016號法令）與境內進口報關主體

summary.en: Egyptian market access for regulated consumer products, including lithium batteries and power banks, is gated by GOEIC registration under Ministerial Decree 43/2016: the foreign manufacturing factory (and/or the brand owner) must be entered in the GOEIC registry, and the Egyptian importer must itself be a registered, locally established entity acting as importer of record. Registration requires documents such as the factory's quality-system certificate (e.g. ISO 9001), trademark registration, and proof of conformity with the applicable EOS standard. Goods from an unregistered factory are refused clearance regardless of product quality. Import inspection by GOEIC at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta then verifies the consignment against the registration and the product safety documentation before release.
summary.zh: 受监管消费品（包括锂电池及移动电源）进入埃及市场，须经依第43/2016号部长令的GOEIC注册把关：境外制造工厂（及/或品牌商）须登入GOEIC注册名录，埃及进口商本身亦须为已注册、在埃及设立、作为进口报关主体的实体。注册需提交工厂质量体系证书（如ISO 9001）、商标注册及符合适用EOS标准的证明等文件。来自未注册工厂的货物无论质量如何均被拒绝清关。随后GOEIC在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特口岸进行进口检验，依注册及产品安全文件核验货物后放行。
summary.zht: 受監管消費品（包括鋰電池及行動電源）進入埃及市場，須經依第43/2016號部長令的GOEIC登記把關：境外製造工廠（及/或品牌商）須登入GOEIC登記名錄，埃及進口商本身亦須為已登記、在埃及設立、作為進口報關主體的實體。登記需提交工廠品質體系證書（如ISO 9001）、商標註冊及符合適用EOS標準的證明等文件。來自未登記工廠的貨物無論品質如何均被拒絕清關。隨後GOEIC在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特口岸進行進口檢驗，依登記及產品安全文件核驗貨物後放行。

standards_or_laws: Ministerial Decree 43/2016 — GOEIC registry for importing companies and foreign factories of regulated products
GOEIC import inspection regime — General Organization for Export and Import Control (Ministry of Trade and Industry, Egypt)
Egyptian Customs Law and import-labelling requirements (country of origin, importer details)

summary.en: China's domestic market-access controls for lithium batteries centre on the manufacturer holding a valid business licence, GB 31241 safety compliance, and CCC certification for in-scope finished products, sold through the manufacturer's own channels. China has no concept equivalent to a foreign-factory import registry like GOEIC's, and no requirement that a separate in-country importer of record register the overseas factory. A Chinese exporter's domestic licences and GB/CCC documents do not create any standing in the Egyptian GOEIC registry.
summary.zh: 中国锂电池的国内市场准入以制造商持有效营业执照、符合GB 31241安全要求、对适用成品取得CCC认证为核心，通过制造商自有渠道销售。中国不存在与GOEIC境外工厂进口注册名录相当的概念，也不要求独立的境内进口报关主体去注册境外工厂。中国出口商的国内执照及GB/CCC文件，不会在埃及GOEIC注册名录中形成任何身份。
summary.zht: 中國鋰電池的國內市場准入以製造商持有效營業執照、符合GB 31241安全要求、對適用成品取得CCC認證為核心，透過製造商自有渠道銷售。中國不存在與GOEIC境外工廠進口登記名錄相當的概念，也不要求獨立的境內進口報關主體去登記境外工廠。中國出口商的國內執照及GB/CCC文件，不會在埃及GOEIC登記名錄中形成任何身份。

standards_or_laws: Manufacturer business licence — State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — for in-scope finished products

gap.en: The decisive Egyptian gate is administrative, not technical: without GOEIC registration of the foreign factory under Decree 43/2016 and a registered Egyptian importer of record, the shipment cannot clear customs even with perfect safety reports. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) the factory must be pre-registered in the GOEIC registry, which takes lead time and documentation (ISO 9001, trademark, EOS conformity evidence); (2) a locally established importer must hold the import licence and act as importer of record; (3) consignments are inspected at port against the registration. Chinese domestic licences, GB reports, and a CCC mark provide no GOEIC standing, so registration must be arranged in advance with the Egyptian partner.
gap.zh: 决定性的埃及关口是行政性而非技术性的：若未依第43/2016号法令完成境外工厂的GOEIC注册并具备已注册的埃及进口报关主体，即使安全报告完美，货物亦无法清关。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）工厂须预先登入GOEIC注册名录，需要前置时间与文件（ISO 9001、商标、EOS合格证据）；（2）须由在埃及设立的进口商持有进口许可并作为进口报关主体；（3）货物在口岸依注册接受检验。中国国内执照、GB报告及CCC标志不提供任何GOEIC身份，故注册须与埃及合作方提前安排。
gap.zht: 決定性的埃及關口是行政性而非技術性的：若未依第43/2016號法令完成境外工廠的GOEIC登記並具備已登記的埃及進口報關主體，即使安全報告完美，貨物亦無法清關。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）工廠須預先登入GOEIC登記名錄，需要前置時間與文件（ISO 9001、商標、EOS合格證據）；（2）須由在埃及設立的進口商持有進口許可並作為進口報關主體；（3）貨物在口岸依登記接受檢驗。中國國內執照、GB報告及CCC標誌不提供任何GOEIC身份，故登記須與埃及合作方提前安排。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GOEIC foreign-factory and importer registration under Decree 43/2016 plus a registered in-country importer of record are prerequisites for customs clearance of lithium batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — business licence, GB 31241 compliance, and CCC for in-scope finished products; no foreign-factory import registry equivalent to GOEIC

source.publisher: GOEIC — General Organization for Export and Import Control (Ministry of Trade and Industry, Egypt)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egyptian market access hinges on GOEIC registration of the foreign factory under Decree 43/2016 and a registered, locally established importer of record, with port inspection at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta. Chinese domestic licences, GB 31241 reports, and a CCC mark create no GOEIC standing, so a shipment from an unregistered factory will be refused regardless of quality. Exporters should arrange GOEIC factory registration and the importer of record well before shipping, and confirm the current document list with their Egyptian partner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及市场准入取决于依第43/2016号法令完成的境外工厂GOEIC注册，以及已注册、在埃及设立的进口报关主体，并在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特口岸接受检验。中国国内执照、GB 31241报告及CCC标志不形成任何GOEIC身份，故来自未注册工厂的货物无论质量如何均被拒绝。出口商应在装运前充分提前安排GOEIC工厂注册及进口报关主体，并向埃及合作方核实现行文件清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及市場准入取決於依第43/2016號法令完成的境外工廠GOEIC登記，以及已登記、在埃及設立的進口報關主體，並在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特口岸接受檢驗。中國國內執照、GB 31241報告及CCC標誌不形成任何GOEIC身份，故來自未登記工廠的貨物無論品質如何均被拒絕。出口商應在裝運前充分提前安排GOEIC工廠登記及進口報關主體，並向埃及合作方核實現行文件清單。
